testimonials.name: Sarah Johnson
testimonials.text: One of the most dedicated CSE graduates I've worked with. Exceptional problem-solving skills and deep understanding of full-stack development.

testimonials.name: Md. Rahman
testimonials.text: Rakib delivered our MVP in just 2 weeks. The code quality was excellent, and he communicated clearly throughout the process.

testimonials.name: Priya Sharma
testimonials.text: His portfolio projects demonstrate both technical depth and creative UI/UX thinking. Highly recommended for any web dev role.
